Home

Noisy Page

This article body has real prose that should be the only thing in the output. Around it the page carries inline scripts, styles, a noscript block, an SVG icon and a template — none of which may appear anywhere in the rendered Markdown, no matter how the extractor treats the surrounding structure.

A second paragraph of genuine article content that continues past the length threshold so the extractor keeps this region as the main content of the page.

Footer boilerplate.
